user_context.persona: a product manager who wants to add a notification system to a task management app and is talking to the backend architect

feature_requirements.notification_type: In-app only for now. No email or push.
feature_requirements.delivery_mechanism: WebSocket — real-time push to connected clients via socket.io
triggers: Task status changed (e.g., open → in-progress → done)
feature_requirements.persistence: In-memory for now. An array per user. Max 50 notifications stored.
feature_requirements.read_marking: POST /api/notifications/:id/read endpoint to mark as read
feature_requirements.fetch_endpoint: GET /api/notifications — returns the current user's notifications, newest first

user_context.answering_style: Somewhat verbose but decisive. Happy to clarify. Uses product language (not code).
